_howToAdd: Add your club or training meet here: copy an entry, fill in the fields, commit & push (the site redeploys automatically). 'links' types: website | facebook | instagram | whatsapp | telegram | maps | events. 'schedule' and 'venue' are optional.

desc.en: Malaysian Beyblade club running ranked battles, battle arenas and regular Beyblade X events across the country.
desc.zh: 马来西亚爆旋陀螺俱乐部，在全国各地举办排名赛、对战擂台与定期爆旋陀螺 X 活动。

desc.en: Official Malaysian Beyblade page — release news and official tournament announcements (G1–G3).
desc.zh: 马来西亚官方爆旋陀螺专页——新品资讯与官方赛事公告（G1–G3）。

desc.en: Community page sharing Beyblade X news and local competition info.
desc.zh: 分享爆旋陀螺 X 资讯与本地比赛消息的社群专页。

desc.en: World Beyblade Battle Association — Malaysia chapter page.
desc.zh: 世界爆旋陀螺对战协会（WBBA）马来西亚分会专页。

desc.en: Find or start a Beyblade community anywhere in the world on the WBO forum.
desc.zh: 在 WBO 论坛寻找或创建世界任何角落的爆旋陀螺社群。
